channel.title: How to search by author?
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
This is our site: https://prairie-health-blog.vercel.app/
Where you can see if you search by any post title it shows the results but if we search by author nothing appears.
URL of WP Rest API is: https://www.prairiehealth.co/blog/wp-json/wp/v2/posts
Is it possible to search by author name?
Also after search the search texts remain in the search form, how we can remove / clear it after we go to home or other pages?
Our site is based on mars theme.
Thank You. Any help will be appreciable.

item.title: How to search by author?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @zakirsajib

WordPress already provides a link that can be directly used to get the posts of a specific author. You can see these links working in the Twenty Theme for example

https://twentytwenty.frontity.org/author/davidarenas/

These type of links are of the Archive type of pages in WordPress which means they’re a list of posts (or any other custom post type)

In the Twenty Twenty theme these type of links are managed by the <Archive> component

src/components/index.js


<Switch>
  ...
  <Archive when={data.isArchive} />
  ...
>/Switch>
github.com

frontity/frontity

dev/packages/twentytwenty-theme/src/components/archive

» Frontity - The React framework for WordPress. Contribute to frontity/frontity development by creating an account on GitHub.

In the Mars Theme these type of links are managed by the <List> component

src/components/index.js

<Switch>
  ...
  <List when={data.isArchive} />
  ...
</Switch>
github.com

frontity/frontity

dev/packages/mars-theme/src/components/list

» Frontity - The React framework for WordPress. Contribute to frontity/frontity development by creating an account on GitHub.

Hope this helps

Read full topic

item.title: How to search by author?
item.dc:creator: zakirsajib
item.description:
This is our site: https://prairie-health-blog.vercel.app/

Where you can see if you search by any post title it shows the results but if we search by author nothing appears.

URL of WP Rest API is: https://www.prairiehealth.co/blog/wp-json/wp/v2/posts

Is it possible to search by author name?

Also after search the search texts remain in the search form, how we can remove / clear it after we go to home or other pages?

Our site is based on mars theme.

Thank You. Any help will be appreciable.

Read full topic
